title: quercus douglasii var. gambelii
intro: Quercus douglasii var. gambelii, also known as Douglas Fir, is a variant of the Quercus douglasii species, specifically a subspecies of the white oak tree. This plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Quercus douglasii var. gambelii include reducing fever, relieving pain and inflammation, and supporting the immune system. Quercus douglasii var. gambelii is often prepared as a tea or decoction, and its extracts can also be used in capsule or tincture form for its medicinal benefits.
